category_sources: Official homepage describes the Bash Debugger Project as a source-code debugger for bash following gdb command syntax.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is BASH Debugger.
docs_sources: Official homepage has a Documentation section linking ReadTheDocs and the bashdb manual page.
repo_sources: GitHub repository describes itself as Bash debugger code imported from SourceForge.
Official homepage Source Code section links to the GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official homepage says bash debugger and gdb command syntax.
